Table of Contents

Interface IRasterColormap2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster colormap.

[Guid("A4D0D354-B981-4088-9384-2F82A19783A6")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterColormap2 : IRasterColormap

Properties

BinFunction

The Bin function that maps pixel value into colormap index.

IBinFunction BinFunction { get; }

Property Value

IBinFunction

object

LUT

The lookup table (OBJECTID, VALUE) for remaping from index to pixel value.

ITable LUT { set; }

Property Value

ITable

Property Value

object

RemappedBlueValues

The remapped Blue color component values using LUT from index to value (OBJECTID, VALUE).

object RemappedBlueValues { get; }

object
